items.title: Telegram 2FA enabled
items.description: Enable Two-Step Verification in Telegram: Settings → Privacy and Security → Two-Step Verification

items.title: Telegram recovery code saved
items.description: Store your 2FA recovery code offline (e.g., printed or in a password manager). If you lose access to your account, you lose access to your agents.

items.title: Active Telegram sessions reviewed
items.description: Remove unknown sessions: Settings → Privacy and Security → Active Sessions

items.title: Telegram account email set
items.description: Add a recovery email to your Telegram account for account recovery.

items.title: Dedicated trading wallet created
items.description: Create a separate TON wallet exclusively for agent trading. Do not use your primary savings wallet.

items.title: Wallet address verified
items.description: Double-check your TON wallet address character by character. A single typo can result in permanent fund loss.

items.title: Wallet backup secured
items.description: Your seed phrase is stored securely offline. Never store it digitally or share it with anyone.

items.title: Test transaction completed
items.description: Send a small test transaction (e.g., 0.1 TON) to and from your trading wallet to confirm it works correctly.

items.title: Wallet permissions reviewed
items.description: Review which applications and contracts have permissions to interact with your wallet.

items.title: Simulation mode understood
items.description: I have read the User Security Guide and understand the difference between simulation and live trading.

items.title: Risk disclosures read
items.description: I have read the full Risk Disclosures document and accept the risks.

items.title: Strategy behavior understood
items.description: I understand how my chosen strategy behaves, including when it buys, sells, and what triggers a stop-loss.

items.title: Emergency stop procedure known
items.description: I know how to immediately stop my agent: Open the Mini App → Agents → tap agent → Stop Agent Permanently

items.title: Minimum simulation period completed
items.description: My agent has run in simulation mode for at least 7 days (14 days recommended).

items.title: Simulation trade history reviewed
items.description: I have reviewed all simulated trades and the strategy is behaving as expected.

items.title: Simulation drawdown acceptable
items.description: The maximum drawdown in simulation is within my acceptable risk tolerance.

items.title: Simulation ROI reviewed
items.description: I understand that simulation performance is not a guarantee of live performance.

items.title: Risk level set to low for first 30 days
items.description: Start conservative. You can increase your risk level after 30 days of successful live trading.

items.title: Initial capital allocation set to 1–5%
items.description: Allocate only a small fraction of your portfolio for the first month.

items.title: Maximum drawdown limit configured
items.description: Set a drawdown limit you are comfortable with. The agent will stop automatically if this limit is reached.

items.title: Daily loss limit set
items.description: Configure a daily maximum loss to prevent runaway losses.

items.title: Telegram notifications enabled
items.description: Enable trade notifications so you are alerted immediately when your agent executes trades.

items.title: Daily check-in plan in place
items.description: Plan to review your agent dashboard at least once per day during the first week.

items.title: Emergency contact saved
items.description: Know how to reach platform support in case of issues.

items.title: All checklist sections completed
items.description: I have completed all sections of this checklist.

items.title: AI agents can and do lose money
items.description: I understand that AI agents can and do lose money.

items.title: Only investing funds I can afford to lose
items.description: I am only investing funds I can afford to lose entirely.

items.title: No pressure or incentive to enable live trading
items.description: I have not been pressured or incentivized to enable live trading before I feel ready.

items.title: Not relying on platform as primary income
items.description: I am not relying on this platform as my primary source of income.

items.title: Crypto markets are 24/7 — agents may trade at any time
items.description: I understand that crypto markets are available 24/7 and my agent may trade at any time.
